title: Highly Explosive
description: Explosions Everywhere!!! A mod making blast protection more useful! :D
body:
### **Do you like TNT??**   Well you'll Really like this mod! It's pretty challanging by nature, making explosions a common occurance! And you still can make it harder(or easier i don't judge) if you want!  

Highly Explosive is a Pretty simple **Server-sided** (Neo)Forge mod for 1.20+. 

Some features include:
<details>
<summary>Spoilers for the mod!</summary>

- Monsters can spawn with TNT on heads (with 20% to spawn), They explode on death and have a few buffs.
- Creepers exploding on death..
- Creepers in the End and Nether*(Nether Off by default)*!
- Creeper Jokeys?
- Enderman bombers holding Creepers!!
- Zombified Piglins if they are a TNT Head will always chase you like the Bomber

</details>
  


Most numbers in the mod can be customised by gamerules!(all start with he*SomethingFun*)
For example:
- heTntOnUndeadHeads (True/False)
- heTntOnUndeadHeadsChance (0-100), going over or under won't do anything it's a % value

![Giant thingy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qAsfhvrN/images/c40ac436913e7e717d5a855304b181a5cbcdadb6.png)

This is just a small passion project and it likely won't be developed much after release, as a Solo Dev I don't have the time for all of that but in any case for any issues, bugs or ideas regarding the mod, message @n1ktwazny on discord ;D
